focus: Foundational literature for cBioPortal meta-analysis: verify dataset papers (GENIE, MSK-IMPACT, MSK-MET, MSK-CHORD) and pull seed citations for cross-cutting methodological topics.

queries.text: AACR Project GENIE Powering Precision Medicine
AACR GENIE Consortium Pugh Cancer Discovery
Bolton clonal hematopoiesis solid tumor Nature Genetics

candidates.title: AACR Project GENIE: Powering Precision Medicine through an International Consortium
candidates.rationale: Original GENIE dataset paper — cohort scope, panel heterogeneity, access model.

candidates.title: AACR Project GENIE: 100,000 Cases and Beyond
candidates.rationale: GENIE 100k-scale cohort update — current GENIE releases used by this pipeline.

candidates.title: Mutational landscape of metastatic cancer revealed from prospective clinical sequencing of 10,000 patients
Cancer type-specific variation in patterns of driver alterations across 50,000 tumors
candidates.rationale: MSK-IMPACT 50k-scale follow-up — directly comparable to this project's gene x cancer outputs.

candidates.title: Genomic characterization of metastatic patterns from prospective clinical sequencing of 25,000 patients
candidates.rationale: MSK-MET — metastatic cohort, matches archived msk_met_2021/ in this repo.

candidates.title: Automated real-world data integration improves cancer outcome prediction
candidates.rationale: MSK-CHORD — integrates IMPACT genomics with clinical outcomes. Relevant for later outcome-integration extensions.

candidates.title: Cancer therapy shapes the fitness landscape of clonal hematopoiesis
candidates.rationale: CH-variant contamination confounds panel-based tumor mutation calls. Critical before trusting gene x cancer ratios for CH-associated genes.

candidates.title: The cBio cancer genomics portal: an open platform for exploring multidimensional cancer genomics data
candidates.rationale: Foundational cBioPortal platform paper — required citation.

candidates.title: Integrative analysis of complex cancer genomics and clinical profiles using the cBioPortal
Comprehensive Characterization of Cancer Driver Genes and Mutations
candidates.rationale: Pan-cancer driver-gene consensus from TCGA PanCanAtlas.

candidates.title: Scalable Open Science Approach for Mutation Calling of Tumor Exomes Using Multiple Genomic Pipelines
COSMIC: the Catalogue Of Somatic Mutations In Cancer
candidates.rationale: COSMIC + Cancer Gene Census — external validation reference list.

candidates.first_author: ICGC/TCGA Pan-Cancer Analysis of Whole Genomes Consortium
candidates.title: Pan-cancer analysis of whole genomes
candidates.rationale: PCAWG whole-genome complement to panel/WES work.

gaps: Mutational-signatures catalog paper (Alexandrov 2020 Nature) not verified in this run.
Targeted-panel comparability / cross-panel normalization methods not covered.
Cross-study meta-analysis statistical methods for cancer-genomics effect sizes not covered.
